td.div:
This is the editor used to design the content and the look and feel of your email.
TEMPLATE EDITOR
The Template Editor lets you create HTML-based emails using building blocks called "Templates". An email has 3 parts:
Subject Line:
Enter the subject of the email.
Message:
The message has 3 parts: Header, Body, Side Column. Click here to learn more about the EMAIL EDITOR.
Signature:
The signature ("from") for the email.
TEXT EDITOR
The Text Editor lets you create text-based emails using building blocks called "Templates". simplyfyi sends text-based emails as a back up for HTML-based emails to ensure that the text-email gets delivered if HTML-email gets blocked by the receiving party's some email servers (done so usually for security reasons). A text email has 3 parts:
Subject Line:
Enter the subject of the email.
Message:
The message has 3 parts: Header, Body, Side Column. Click here to learn more about the EMAIL EDITOR..
Signature:
The signature ("from") for the email.
EDITOR AND PREVIEW MODES
After creating the structure and content of the email, you can switch to PREVIEW MODE by clicking the link at the top right. The PREVIEW MODE will display the email as the receipient would see it. It will also let you preview with the real data embedded. The THEME drop-down list in the PREVIEW mode lets you change the display and color theme of the email so that you can pick the theme of your choice.
PREVIEW MODEs are available for both the TEMPLATE and TEXT EDITORS.
Click here to learn more about the EMAIL EDITOR.
